revision.text:
{{Navbox
| name = Authority control
| bodyclass = hlist
| group1 = [[Authority control]] | list1 = <includeonly>[[Category:Wikipedia articles with authority control information]]</includeonly> *<!-- *** WorldCat identities *** -->{{#if: {{{WORLDCATID|}}} | {{Authority control/WORLDCATID|{{{WORLDCATID}}}}} |<!-- -->{{#if:{{{LCCN|}}} | {{Authority control/WORLDCAT-LCCN|{{{LCCN}}}}} |}} }} *<!-- *** VIAF *** --> {{#if:{{{VIAF|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/VIAF|{{{VIAF}}}}} }} *<!-- *** LCCN *** --> {{#if:{{{LCCN|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/LCCN|{{{LCCN}}}}} }} *<!-- *** GND *** --> {{#if: {{{GND|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/GND|{{{GND}}}}} }} *<!-- *** PND *** --> {{#if:{{{PND|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/PND|{{{PND}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to deprecated category --> *<!-- *** SELIBR i.e. LIBRIS *** --> {{#if:{{{SELIBR|}}}| {{Template:Authority control/SELIBR|{{{SELIBR}}}}} }} *<!-- *** GKD *** --> {{#if:{{{GKD|}}}|{{Template:Authority control/GKD|{{{GKD}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to deprecated category --> *<!-- *** GKD-V1 *** --> {{#if:{{{GKD-V1|}}}|{{Template:Authority control/GKD-V1|{{{GKD-V1}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to deprecated category --> *<!-- *** SWD *** --> {{#if:{{{SWD|}}}|{{Template:Authority control/SWD|{{{SWD}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to "key words only" category, adds page to deprecated category -->
}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Navbox
| name = Authority control
| bodyclass = hlist

add extralist to list of recognised parameters

revision.text:
{{Navbox
| name = Authority control
| bodyclass = hlist
| group1 = [[Authority control]] | list1 = <includeonly>[[Category:Wikipedia articles with authority control information]]</includeonly> *<!-- *** WorldCat identities *** -->{{#if: {{{WORLDCATID|}}} | {{Authority control/WORLDCATID|{{{WORLDCATID}}}}} |<!-- -->{{#if:{{{LCCN|}}} | {{Authority control/WORLDCAT-LCCN|{{{LCCN}}}}} |}} }} *<!-- *** VIAF *** --> {{#if:{{{VIAF|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/VIAF|{{{VIAF}}}}} }} *<!-- *** LCCN *** --> {{#if:{{{LCCN|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/LCCN|{{{LCCN}}}}} }} *<!-- *** GND *** --> {{#if: {{{GND|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/GND|{{{GND}}}}} }} *<!-- *** PND *** --> {{#if:{{{PND|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/PND|{{{PND}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to deprecated category --> *<!-- *** SELIBR i.e. LIBRIS *** --> {{#if:{{{SELIBR|}}}| {{Template:Authority control/SELIBR|{{{SELIBR}}}}} }} *<!-- *** GKD *** --> {{#if:{{{GKD|}}}|{{Template:Authority control/GKD|{{{GKD}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to deprecated category --> *<!-- *** GKD-V1 *** --> {{#if:{{{GKD-V1|}}}|{{Template:Authority control/GKD-V1|{{{GKD-V1}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to deprecated category --> *<!-- *** SWD *** --> {{#if:{{{SWD|}}}|{{Template:Authority control/SWD|{{{SWD}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to "key words only" category, adds page to deprecated category -->
}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Navbox
| name = Authority control
| bodyclass = hlist
| group1 = [[Authority control]] | list1 = <includeonly>[[Category:Wikipedia articles with authority control information]]</includeonly> *<!-- *** WorldCat identities *** -->{{#if: {{{WORLDCATID|}}} | {{Authority control/WORLDCATID|{{{WORLDCATID}}}}} |<!-- -->{{#if:{{{LCCN|}}} | {{Authority control/WORLDCAT-LCCN|{{{LCCN}}}}} |}} }} *<!-- *** VIAF *** --> {{#if:{{{VIAF|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/VIAF|{{{VIAF}}}}} }} *<!-- *** LCCN *** --> {{#if:{{{LCCN|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/LCCN|{{{LCCN}}}}} }} *<!-- *** GND *** --> {{#if: {{{GND|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/GND|{{{GND}}}}} }} *<!-- *** PND *** --> {{#if:{{{PND|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/PND|{{{PND}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to deprecated category --> *<!-- *** SELIBR i.e. LIBRIS *** --> {{#if:{{{SELIBR|}}}| {{Template:Authority control/SELIBR|{{{SELIBR}}}}} }} *<!-- *** GKD *** --> {{#if:{{{GKD|}}}|{{Template:Authority control/GKD|{{{GKD}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to deprecated category --> *<!-- *** GKD-V1 *** --> {{#if:{{{GKD-V1|}}}|{{Template:Authority control/GKD-V1|{{{GKD-V1}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to deprecated category --> *<!-- *** SWD *** --> {{#if:{{{SWD|}}}|{{Template:Authority control/SWD|{{{SWD}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to "key words only" category, adds page to deprecated category -->
}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: add parameter for BPN per talk page
add new identifiers, see talk page
removed PND output; see talk page request
remove parent cat as per request

revision.text: {{#invoke:Authority control|authorityControl}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Changed protection level of Template:Authority control: allow template editors to modify ([Edit=Protected template] (indefinite) [Move=Protected template] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{#invoke:Authority control|authorityControl}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: adding [[Category:Pages using authority control with parameters]] per request at [[User talk:T.seppelt]]
Nominated for deletion; see [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2017 November 15#Template:Authority control]]. ([[WP:TW|TW]])
WORLDCATIDs don't belong in Wikidata, per TPER
Undid revision 917353006 by [[Special:Contributions/Tom.Reding|Tom.Reding]] ([[User talk:Tom.Reding|talk]]); rv when adding support for [[d:Property:P7859]] as per request
add support for lowercase parameter names per talk
Force [[Module:Check for unknown parameters]] to ignore blank, suppressed params, which are already tracked in [[Category:Wikipedia articles with suppressed authority control identifiers]]
Force tracking of blank positional/unnamed params, which [[Module:Authority control]] does not use
/* top */ Sort by unknown param to match associated [[Category:Pages using authority control with parameters different on Wikidata]]
Don't treat |state= as an unknown parameter
Categories deleted, [[Wikipedia:Categories_for_discussion/Log/2021_June_4#Category:VIAF_not_on_Wikidata]]. [[user:Tom.Reding]] please review whether anything more can be pruned
Allow arts param from {{Authority control (arts)}}; rep cmts with noincludes to rm from the expanded template; from sandbox
add extralist to list of recognised parameters
unknown parameter checking now done by module

revision.text:
{{Navbox
| name = Authority control
| bodyclass = hlist
| group1 = [[Authority control]] | list1 = <includeonly>[[Category:Wikipedia articles with authority control information]]</includeonly> *<!-- *** WorldCat identities *** -->{{#if: {{{WORLDCATID|}}} | {{Authority control/WORLDCATID|{{{WORLDCATID}}}}} |<!-- -->{{#if:{{{LCCN|}}} | {{Authority control/WORLDCAT-LCCN|{{{LCCN}}}}} |}} }} *<!-- *** VIAF *** --> {{#if:{{{VIAF|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/VIAF|{{{VIAF}}}}} }} *<!-- *** LCCN *** --> {{#if:{{{LCCN|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/LCCN|{{{LCCN}}}}} }} *<!-- *** GND *** --> {{#if: {{{GND|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/GND|{{{GND}}}}} }} *<!-- *** PND *** --> {{#if:{{{PND|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/PND|{{{PND}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to deprecated category --> *<!-- *** SELIBR i.e. LIBRIS *** --> {{#if:{{{SELIBR|}}}| {{Template:Authority control/SELIBR|{{{SELIBR}}}}} }} *<!-- *** GKD *** --> {{#if:{{{GKD|}}}|{{Template:Authority control/GKD|{{{GKD}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to deprecated category --> *<!-- *** GKD-V1 *** --> {{#if:{{{GKD-V1|}}}|{{Template:Authority control/GKD-V1|{{{GKD-V1}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to deprecated category --> *<!-- *** SWD *** --> {{#if:{{{SWD|}}}|{{Template:Authority control/SWD|{{{SWD}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to "key words only" category, adds page to deprecated category -->
}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

| group1 = [[Authority control]] | list1 = <includeonly>[[Category:Wikipedia articles with authority control information]]</includeonly> *<!-- *** WorldCat identities *** -->{{#if: {{{WORLDCATID|}}} | {{Authority control/WORLDCATID|{{{WORLDCATID}}}}} |<!-- -->{{#if:{{{LCCN|}}} | {{Authority control/WORLDCAT-LCCN|{{{LCCN}}}}} |}} }} *<!-- *** VIAF *** --> {{#if:{{{VIAF|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/VIAF|{{{VIAF}}}}} }} *<!-- *** LCCN *** --> {{#if:{{{LCCN|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/LCCN|{{{LCCN}}}}} }} *<!-- *** ORCID *** --> {{#if:{{{ORCID|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/ORCID|{{{ORCID}}}}} }} *<!-- *** GND *** --> {{#if: {{{GND|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/GND|{{{GND}}}}} }} *<!-- *** PND *** --> {{#if:{{{PND|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/PND|{{{PND}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to deprecated category --> *<!-- *** SELIBR i.e. LIBRIS *** --> {{#if:{{{SELIBR|}}}| {{Template:Authority control/SELIBR|{{{SELIBR}}}}} }} *<!-- *** GKD *** --> {{#if:{{{GKD|}}}|{{Template:Authority control/GKD|{{{GKD}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to deprecated category --> *<!-- *** GKD-V1 *** --> {{#if:{{{GKD-V1|}}}|{{Template:Authority control/GKD-V1|{{{GKD-V1}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to deprecated category --> *<!-- *** SWD *** --> {{#if:{{{SWD|}}}|{{Template:Authority control/SWD|{{{SWD}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to "key words only" category, adds page to deprecated category -->
}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: add parameter for BPN per talk page
add new identifiers, see talk page
removed PND output; see talk page request
remove parent cat as per request

revision.text: {{#invoke:Authority control|authorityControl}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Changed protection level of Template:Authority control: allow template editors to modify ([Edit=Protected template] (indefinite) [Move=Protected template] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{#invoke:Authority control|authorityControl}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: adding [[Category:Pages using authority control with parameters]] per request at [[User talk:T.seppelt]]
Nominated for deletion; see [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2017 November 15#Template:Authority control]]. ([[WP:TW|TW]])
WORLDCATIDs don't belong in Wikidata, per TPER
Undid revision 917353006 by [[Special:Contributions/Tom.Reding|Tom.Reding]] ([[User talk:Tom.Reding|talk]]); rv when adding support for [[d:Property:P7859]] as per request
add support for lowercase parameter names per talk
Force [[Module:Check for unknown parameters]] to ignore blank, suppressed params, which are already tracked in [[Category:Wikipedia articles with suppressed authority control identifiers]]
Force tracking of blank positional/unnamed params, which [[Module:Authority control]] does not use
/* top */ Sort by unknown param to match associated [[Category:Pages using authority control with parameters different on Wikidata]]
Don't treat |state= as an unknown parameter
Categories deleted, [[Wikipedia:Categories_for_discussion/Log/2021_June_4#Category:VIAF_not_on_Wikidata]]. [[user:Tom.Reding]] please review whether anything more can be pruned
Allow arts param from {{Authority control (arts)}}; rep cmts with noincludes to rm from the expanded template; from sandbox
add extralist to list of recognised parameters
unknown parameter checking now done by module

revision.comment: Undo: the selibr bib/id and auth/id are two different sets of objects, bib for books (or whatever), auth for authority records, the ids are not related
revision.text:
'''[[Authority control]]''': {{#if:{{{PND|}}}| [[Personennamendatei|PND]]: [http://d-nb.info/gnd/{{{PND}}} {{{PND}}}] {{#if:{{{LCCN|}}}||}} }} {{#if:{{{LCCN|}}}|[[Library of Congress Control Number|LCCN]]: [http://id.loc.gov/authorities/names/{{ParmPart|1|{{{LCCN}}} }}{{ParmPart|2|{{{LCCN}}} }}{{padleft:{{ParmPart|3|{{{LCCN}}} }}|6|0}}.html {{ParmPart|1|{{{LCCN}}} }}{{ParmPart|2|{{{LCCN}}} }}{{padleft:{{ParmPart|3|{{{LCCN}}} }}|6|0}}]}} {{#if:{{{VIAF|}}}|{{#if:{{{PND|}}}{{{LCCN|}}}||}} [[Virtual International Authority File|VIAF]]: [http://viaf.org/viaf/{{{VIAF}}} {{{VIAF}}}]}} {{#if:{{{SELIBR|}}}|{{#if:{{{PND|}}}{{{LCCN|}}}{{{VIAF|}}}||}} [[SELIBR]]: [http://libris.kb.se/auth/{{{SELIBR}}} {{{SELIBR}}}] {{#if:{{{GKD|}}}||}} }} {{#if:{{{GKD|}}}|[[Gemeinsame Körperschaftsdatei|GKD]] in the DNB: [http://d-nb.info/gnd/{{{GKD}}} {{{GKD}}}] {{#if:{{{GKD-V1|}}}||}} }} {{#if:{{{GKD-V1|}}}|DNB: [http://d-nb.info/gnd/{{{GKD-V1}}} {{{GKD-V1}}}] {{#if:{{{SWD|}}}||}} }} {{#if:{{{SWD|}}}|[[Schlagwortnormdatei|SWD]] in the DNB: [http://d-nb.info/gnd/{{{SWD}}} {{{SWD}}}][[Category:Wikipedia:Authority_control (key words only)]]|[[Category:Wikipedia:Authority_control (persons only)]] }} {{#if: {{{WORLDCATID|}}} | {{#if:{{{PND|}}}{{{LCCN|}}}{{{VIAF|}}}{{{SELIBR|}}}{{{GKD|}}}{{{GKD-V1|}}}{{{GKD-V2|}}}{{{SWD|}}}{{{EST|}}} | |}} [http://www.worldcat.org/identities/{{{WORLDCATID}}} WorldCat] | {{#if:{{{LCCN|}}} | {{#if:{{{PND|}}}{{{LCCN|}}}{{{VIAF|}}}{{{SELIBR|}}}{{{GKD|}}}{{{GKD-V1|}}}{{{GKD-V2|}}}{{{SWD|}}}{{{EST|}}} | |}} [http://www.worldcat.org/identities/lccn-{{ParmPart|1|{{{LCCN}}} }}{{ParmPart|2|{{{LCCN}}} }}-{{ParmPart|3|{{{LCCN}}} }} WorldCat] |}}}}

revision.text:
{{Navbox
| name = Authority control
| bodyclass = hlist
| group1 = [[Authority control]] | list1 = <includeonly>[[Category:Wikipedia articles with authority control information]]</includeonly> *<!-- *** WorldCat identities *** -->{{#if: {{{WORLDCATID|}}} | {{Authority control/WORLDCATID|{{{WORLDCATID}}}}} |<!-- -->{{#if:{{{LCCN|}}} | {{Authority control/WORLDCAT-LCCN|{{{LCCN}}}}} |}} }} *<!-- *** VIAF *** --> {{#if:{{{VIAF|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/VIAF|{{{VIAF}}}}} }} *<!-- *** LCCN *** --> {{#if:{{{LCCN|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/LCCN|{{{LCCN}}}}} }} *<!-- *** GND *** --> {{#if: {{{GND|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/GND|{{{GND}}}}} }} *<!-- *** PND *** --> {{#if:{{{PND|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/PND|{{{PND}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to deprecated category --> *<!-- *** SELIBR i.e. LIBRIS *** --> {{#if:{{{SELIBR|}}}| {{Template:Authority control/SELIBR|{{{SELIBR}}}}} }} *<!-- *** GKD *** --> {{#if:{{{GKD|}}}|{{Template:Authority control/GKD|{{{GKD}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to deprecated category --> *<!-- *** GKD-V1 *** --> {{#if:{{{GKD-V1|}}}|{{Template:Authority control/GKD-V1|{{{GKD-V1}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to deprecated category --> *<!-- *** SWD *** --> {{#if:{{{SWD|}}}|{{Template:Authority control/SWD|{{{SWD}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to "key words only" category, adds page to deprecated category -->
}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.text: {{#invoke:Authority control|authorityControl}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Changed protection level of Template:Authority control: allow template editors to modify ([Edit=Protected template] (indefinite) [Move=Protected template] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{#invoke:Authority control|authorityControl}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: adding [[Category:Pages using authority control with parameters]] per request at [[User talk:T.seppelt]]
Nominated for deletion; see [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2017 November 15#Template:Authority control]]. ([[WP:TW|TW]])
WORLDCATIDs don't belong in Wikidata, per TPER
Undid revision 917353006 by [[Special:Contributions/Tom.Reding|Tom.Reding]] ([[User talk:Tom.Reding|talk]]); rv when adding support for [[d:Property:P7859]] as per request
add support for lowercase parameter names per talk
Force [[Module:Check for unknown parameters]] to ignore blank, suppressed params, which are already tracked in [[Category:Wikipedia articles with suppressed authority control identifiers]]
Force tracking of blank positional/unnamed params, which [[Module:Authority control]] does not use
/* top */ Sort by unknown param to match associated [[Category:Pages using authority control with parameters different on Wikidata]]
Don't treat |state= as an unknown parameter
Categories deleted, [[Wikipedia:Categories_for_discussion/Log/2021_June_4#Category:VIAF_not_on_Wikidata]]. [[user:Tom.Reding]] please review whether anything more can be pruned
Allow arts param from {{Authority control (arts)}}; rep cmts with noincludes to rm from the expanded template; from sandbox
add extralist to list of recognised parameters
unknown parameter checking now done by module
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 20:14:24 on [[Template:Authority control]]

revision.text:
{{Navbox
| name = Authority control
| bodyclass = hlist
| group1 = [[Authority control]] | list1 = <includeonly>[[Category:Wikipedia articles with authority control information]]</includeonly> *<!-- *** WorldCat identities *** -->{{#if: {{{WORLDCATID|}}} | {{Authority control/WORLDCATID|{{{WORLDCATID}}}}} |<!-- -->{{#if:{{{LCCN|}}} | {{Authority control/WORLDCAT-LCCN|{{{LCCN}}}}} |}} }} *<!-- *** VIAF *** --> {{#if:{{{VIAF|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/VIAF|{{{VIAF}}}}} }} *<!-- *** LCCN *** --> {{#if:{{{LCCN|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/LCCN|{{{LCCN}}}}} }} *<!-- *** GND *** --> {{#if: {{{GND|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/GND|{{{GND}}}}} }} *<!-- *** PND *** --> {{#if:{{{PND|}}} | {{Template:Authority control/PND|{{{PND}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to deprecated category --> *<!-- *** SELIBR i.e. LIBRIS *** --> {{#if:{{{SELIBR|}}}| {{Template:Authority control/SELIBR|{{{SELIBR}}}}} }} *<!-- *** GKD *** --> {{#if:{{{GKD|}}}|{{Template:Authority control/GKD|{{{GKD}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to deprecated category --> *<!-- *** GKD-V1 *** --> {{#if:{{{GKD-V1|}}}|{{Template:Authority control/GKD-V1|{{{GKD-V1}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to deprecated category --> *<!-- *** SWD *** --> {{#if:{{{SWD|}}}|{{Template:Authority control/SWD|{{{SWD}}}}} }}<!-- adds page to "key words only" category, adds page to deprecated category -->
}}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

{{Navbox
| name = Authority control
| bodyclass = hlist
